import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; const CertificatesList = ({ certificates }) => { const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all'); const [selectedCertificates, setSelectedCertificates] = useState([]); // Handle search input change const handleSearchChange = e => { setSearchTerm(e.target.value); }; // Handle status filter change const handleStatusFilterChange = e => { setStatusFilter(e.target.value); }; // Handle certificate selection const handleSelectCertificate = id => { setSelectedCertificates(prev => { if (prev.includes(id)) { return prev.filter(certId => certId !== id); } else { return [...prev, id]; } }); }; // Handle "Select All" checkbox const handleSelectAll = () => { if (selectedCertificates.length === filteredCertificates.length) { setSelectedCertificates([]); } else { setSelectedCertificates(filteredCertificates.map(cert => cert._id)); } }; // Apply filters and search const filteredCertificates = certificates.filter(cert => { // Status filter if (statusFilter !== 'all' && cert.status !== statusFilter) { return false; } // Search term const searchTermLower = searchTerm.toLowerCase(); return ( cert.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTermLower) || cert.certificateId.toLowerCase().includes(searchTermLower) || cert.program.toLowerCase().includes(searchTermLower) ); }); // Handle certificate deletion (in a real app, this would call an API) const handleDeleteSelected = () => { if ( window.confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete ${selectedCertificates.length} certificates?`) ) { console.log('Deleting certificates:', selectedCertificates); // Here you would call your API to delete the certificates alert(`${selectedCertificates.length} certificates deleted successfully`); setSelectedCertificates([]); } }; return (
{/* Toolbar */}
{selectedCertificates.length > 0 && ( )}
{/* Certificates Table */}
{filteredCertificates.length > 0 ? ( filteredCertificates.map(certificate => ( )) ) : ( )}
0 } onChange={handleSelectAll} />
Certificate ID Name Program Date Status Actions
handleSelectCertificate(certificate._id)} />

{certificate.name}
{certificate.program}
{certificate.date}
 {certificate.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + certificate.status.slice(1)}

{/* Pagination */}

Showing 1 to{' '} {filteredCertificates.length} of{' '} {certificates.length} certificates

); }; export default CertificatesList;
